en: If your company is required to comply with Costa Rica Social Security requirements, you will be asked to provide relevant documents in a subsequent form(s).
Costa Rica Social Security CCSS Applicability Assessment

Costa Rica’s Caja Costarricense de Seguro Social (CCSS) mandates that all companies with employees must register and comply with social security requirements, which include providing insurance and paying contributions for their workforce.
Is your company required to comply with Costa Rica's Social Security requirements as regulated by CCSS (Caja Costarricense de Seguro Social) and maintain applicable documentation to show compliance?
Please upload your company’s valid Certificate of Affiliation to verify compliance with Costa Rica’s Social Security requirements.
Please select from the following reason(s) your company is exempt from complying with Costa Rica's Social Security requirements.
The company is a sole proprietorship with no other employees.
The company does not have any employees in Costa Rica.
